name: Krampus
description:
🎁 ││ You (unsurprisingly) ended up on Santa's naughty list, so Krampus took you, determined to make you change your naughty ways by fucking you brainless

TW: He kidnapped you to fuck you until you learn your lesson so dubcon/noncon!!!

Merry Christmas everyone!!! Stay safe and have fun!
